title: Planning a Weekend Trip 周末出游计划
scene: 一家人讨论周末去哪里玩。

lines.en: What do you want to do this weekend?
Can we go to the amusement park?
That is a good idea. The weather will be nice.
I want to ride the roller coaster!
Are you brave enough for that?
Yes! I am not scared at all!
OK. We will also need to bring some snacks and water.
lines.zh: 好的。我们还需要带些零食和水。

lines.en: I can help pack the bags. What should I bring?
lines.zh: 我可以帮忙装包。我该带什么？

lines.en: Sunscreen, a hat, and your water bottle.
lines.zh: 防晒霜、帽子和你的水杯。

lines.en: I am so excited! This will be the best weekend!
lines.zh: 我太激动了！这将是最好的周末！
